title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED THIRTY-SIX HUNDRED TWENTY-FIVE, ENTITLED "AN ACT CONVERTING THE LEON HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LEON, PROVINCE OF ILOILO, INTO A NATIONAL AGRICULTURAL HIGH SCHOOL AND AUTHORIZING THE APPROPRIATION OF FUNDS THEREFOR."

chunks.text:
H. No. 18261 / 65 OG No. 47, 13008 (November 24, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5552, June 21, 1969 ]

AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED THIRTY-SIX HUNDRED TWENTY-FIVE, ENTITLED "AN ACT CONVERTING THE LEON HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LEON, PROVINCE OF ILOILO, INTO A NATIONAL AGRICULTURAL HIGH SCHOOL AND AUTHORIZING THE APPROPRIATION OF FUNDS THEREFOR."

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Section one of Republic Act Numbered Thirty-six hundred twenty-five is hereby amended to read as follows:

"SECTION 1. Leon Regional High School in the MunicÂipality of Leon, Province of Iloilo, is hereby converted into a national agricultural high school and this school shall continue to be located at its present site in the Municipality of Leon, Province of Iloilo."

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1969.
